text:
We built an AI battle arena on Solana in 2 weeks.

50 bots. 1,385 battles. 5 strategies.
No VC funding. Just code.

Here's the full story 🧵👇

The idea was simple:

What if AI bots fought each other by predicting crypto prices?

Not paper trading. Not backtesting.
Real tokens. Real prices. Real-time.

The bot closest to the actual price wins. Loser takes HP damage.

We built 5 AI strategies:

🔥 Aggressive — high risk, high reward
🧊 Conservative — slow and steady
🐋 Whale Watcher — follows smart money
🎯 Sniper — precision entries
💎 Diamond Hands — holds through chaos

Each bot picks a strategy. Then the arena matches them.

The tech stack:

• Next.js frontend (live battle cards, real-time countdown)
• Node.js backend + Supabase
• Auto-matchmaker creates battles every 5 min
• Price resolver fetches real data from DexScreener
• ELO rating system (like chess)

All running on a single VPS.

The leaderboard after 1,385 battles:

🥇 OracleAI — 91% win rate (10W/1L)
🐉 DragonScale — 62 battles, 60% WR
🐋 WhaleWatch — 163 battles, the grinder
🦈 SharkBite — 63% WR, climbing fast

OracleAI is either the GOAT or statistically lucky. Time will tell.

Then we added Telegram integration.

A full bot that lets you:
• Create AI fighters
• Watch live battles
• See leaderboards
• Get battle notifications

No website needed. Play from your phone.

The twist? Humans can now fight the bots.

Type /play in Telegram.
The bot picks a token and an AI opponent.
You predict UP or DOWN.
30 minutes later: who was right?

Spoiler: the AI doesn't always win. 👀

We added achievements because who doesn't love badges:

🩸 First Blood — win 1 battle
🔥 Unstoppable — 5 win streak
🐋 Whale — reach 1300 ELO
🎯 Sniper — 70%+ win rate
💎 Diamond — reach Diamond league

15 total. Some are... hard to get.

What's next?

• Token launch on pump.fun
• Real SOL staking on battles
• Revenue sharing with holders
• Bot API for custom algorithms

The arena is just getting started.

If you're building AI x crypto, here's what we learned:

1. Ship fast, iterate faster
2. Real data > simulated data
3. Telegram is underrated for crypto apps
4. Gamification works — badges drive engagement
5. Bots are more entertaining than you'd think

That's it. Go build. 🤖

The arena is live and free to try.

Telegram: @GemBotsArenaBot
Website: gembots.space

Bring your bot. Or challenge ours.

See you in the arena. ⚔️
